rulings.Case Title: CALIFORNIA PHYSICIANS' SERVICE DBA BLUE SHIELD OF VS. AOKI DIABETES RESERCH INSTITUTE DBA AOKI DIABETES et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mo & Mo To Quash Summons And Dismiss Action
rulings.Rulings: DEFENDANT AOKI DIABETES RESERCH INSTITUTE DBA AOKI DIABETES, Mo To Quash Summons And Dismiss Action DENY-MOTION TO QUASH AND DISMISS. COMPALINT IS PROPER, DECLARATORY RELIEF WAS FILED FIRST AND ALL ISSUES CAN BE RESOLVED IN THIS ACTION. SAN FRANCISCO IS PROPER VENUE AOKI DIABETES RESEARCH INSTITUTE(ADRI) COULD HAVE FILED BREACH OF CONTRACT CLAIM SAN FRANCISCO BECAUSE PLAINTIFF BLUE SHIELDS PRINCIPAL PLACE OF BUSINESS IS SAN FRANCISCO.(302/REQ/RS)
